title: Rtp Tortega
description: A simple RTP GUI plugin: open the menu, choose a world, and teleport to a safe random location.
body:
**✅ Rtp Tortega – Simple & Safe Random Teleporting**

Rtp Tortega is a clean, fast, and beginner-friendly random teleport plugin made for Paper, Purpur, and Folia servers on Minecraft 1.21+.
Players can easily teleport to a safe random location using a smooth GUI — perfect for survival, SMP, and large public servers.

The plugin is lightweight, stable, and fully optimized for Folia (fixed scheduler issues), making it ideal for modern high-performance servers.

✅ Features

/rtp command to open a simple teleport menu

Click-GUI for Overworld, Nether, and End teleporting

Safe-spot detection (no lava, caves, or unsafe blocks)

Built-in cooldown system (customizable)

Live-updating GUI with ping and player count

Full Folia support

No configuration required — works out of the box

✅ Commands
/rtp

Opens the RTP GUI.

/rtp eu

Teleports the player directly to a random safe spot in the Overworld (EU = Overworld shortcut).

/rtp reload

Reloads the plugin configuration.

✅ Permissions
✅ rtp.use

Allows using:

/rtp

/rtp eu
(Default: true for everyone)

✅ rtp.reload

Allows using:

/rtp reload
(Default: OP only)

✅ rtp.cooldown.*

Gives special custom cooldowns.
(Default: OP)
Examples your plugin supports:

rtp.cooldown.5

rtp.cooldown.10
(You can create any value like rtp.cooldown.30)

✅ Compatibility

✅ Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.8

✅ Paper

✅ Purpur

✅ Folia (fully supported and tested)



✅ Why choose Rtp Tortega?

It’s simple for beginners, fast for big servers, safe for players, and optimized for the newest server software.
Perfect for any SMP or survival-based server looking for a clean random teleport system.
